11. Area of interest (please indicate courses taken/certification done which qualify you 
for the role) 
My primary interests lie at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, and Generative 
Al, with a focus on data-driven real-world problem solving. Through coursework and projects, I 
have built a foundation in machine learning (regression, classification, clustering), deep learning 
(ANN, CNNs, RNNS, BERT), data preprocessing, and Python. Key projects include a Sign Language 
Translator, Optimal Radar Deployment, customer churn prediction, handwritten digit 
classification using ANN, and sentiment analysis that strengthen my skills in model building and 
evaluation. 

Complementing my technical abilities, I have developed competencies in project planning, 
problem structuring, and decision-making for technology-driven systems. I am keen to explore 
how large-scale platforms like UIDAl integrate technology, governance, and data security. I have 
also earned the Oracle Level 3 Certification (four courses), along with Anthropic Al Certifications 
and the 1SRO START 2025 program in space science and technology, reflecting my readiness to 
contribute to intelligent systems and strategic roles during an internship. 
12. Remarks (In brief not exceeding 50 words): 
A motivated and detail-oriented student with strong interest in Al and data-driven solutions. 
Eager to apply technical and analytical skills in real-world systems, contribute to impactful 
projects, and gain practical exposure in a structured organization like UIDAI. 
I declare that the information given by me is true, correct and to the best of my 
knowledge and nothing has been concealed
